title: Velvety Norwegian Spinach Soup
description: A fresh and velvety one-pot dish featuring pink food coloring for a touch of color and sweetness from sugar-free-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: 2 cups chicken broth
ingredients.notes: Ensure it is not heated before adding to the pot.

instructions: Place frozen spinach in a large pot. Pour hot chicken broth over it and stir.
Melt butter in the same pot over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Gradually add milk to the pot with spinach mixture, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
Season with salt and pepper. Gently stir in pink food coloring until desired color is achieved.
Reduce heat and simmer for an additional 5 minutes. The soup should be thickened but still smooth from the addition of milk.
Garnish each bowl with freshly grated Parmesan cheese before serving.
